description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular structure with a dark wood grain finish on the top, sides, and back, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The front face is fitted with three evenly sized drawers, each adorned with a curved, metallic bar pull handle in a silver or gray tone. The drawer fronts are a contrasting light beige or off-white color, providing a modern two-tone aesthetic. The overall build appears robust, with clean lines and a flat top surface suitable for placing additional items. There are no visible decorative embellishments or branding, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The chest is likely constructed from engineered wood or MDF with a veneer finish, and the drawers are designed to be easily opened and closed using the handles.
description: A modern, two-tone chest of drawers with three light-colored drawers and metallic bar pull handles, set in a dark wood grain frame. The design is minimalist and functional, with a flat top and clean lines.
description_view_0: The left side of the chest, showing the dark wood grain finish with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying three light-colored drawers with metallic bar pull handles set in a dark wood frame.
description_view_2: The right side of the chest, similar to the left, showing only the dark wood grain finish.
description_view_3: The back view, featuring a plain dark wood grain panel with no visible drawers or handles.
